name: Kento Hyono
title: Full Stack Developer
subtitle: Building thoughtful digital experiences
bioFirst: I'm a full-stack developer focused on solving real-world problems to make life more efficient and enjoyable. With expertise in modern web architectures like React and FastAPI, I also have a deep passion for learning/implementing cloud architectures and CI/CD operations.
bioSecond: With a philosophy of continuous improvement, I'm committed to learning innovative technologies and applying them to enhance our lives. I pick up new things quickly and I'm always looking for the next challenge. Outside of coding, I stay active through working out and playing sports.
heroDescription: Full-stack developer focused on building impactful applications with modern technologies and clean design.
